get.summary: GetAppConsumptionDistribution returns the consumption distribution across applications.

parameters.description: Time range filter: "today", "this-week", "this-month", "this-quarter". Default is "today".
parameters.name: timeRange

parameters.description: Cluster filter (optional). If empty, all clusters are included football.
parameters.name: cluster

get.summary:
GetCapacityBottleneckForecast returns the predicted number of days until
token throughput reaches rated capacity, based on historical growth trend.
GetCumulativeOutput returns the cumulative token output and growth rate for a given time range.

parameters.description: Time range filter: "today", "this-week", "this-month", "this-quarter".
parameters.name: timeRange

get.summary:
GetDepartmentTokenUsage returns per-department token usage and budget for the given time window.
Results are sorted by token_total descending. WS-mode frontend uses this data to render
the department Token consumption ranking panel and calculate budget spend percentage.

parameters.description: Start of the query window (UTC, inclusive).
parameters.name: startTime

parameters.description: End of the query window (UTC, exclusive).
parameters.name: endTime

get.summary: GetInternalBusinessStructureDistribution returns internal business structure distribution for WS mode.

parameters.description: Time range filter: "today", "this-week", "this-month", "this-quarter". Default is "today".
parameters.name: timeRange

parameters.description: Cluster filter (optional). If empty, all clusters are included.
parameters.name: cluster

get.summary:
GetMonthEndForecastMetrics returns month-end revenue and gross profit forecast metrics.
Uses empty request; server calculates based on current month context.
GetRatedCapacity returns the rated capacity value (in millions).

GetRevenueMarginTrendForecast returns 37 daily points (30 historical + 7 forecast)
for the "Revenue and Margin Trend and Forecast" panel.
This panel uses a fixed window and ignores dashboard time-range switching.
GetRevenueAndProfitMetrics returns revenue, cost, gross profit metrics and optional history.

parameters.description: Time range filter: "today", "this-week", "this-month", "this-quarter".
parameters.name: timeRange

get.summary: GetRiskSuggestions returns the current risk identification and business suggestions.

GetTenantTokenUsage returns per-tenant token usage and charge amount for the given time window.
Results are sorted by token_total descending. The frontend uses this data to compute
active tenants, ARPU, customer segmentation, and consumption distribution (Top10).

parameters.description: Start of the query window (UTC, inclusive).
parameters.name: startTime

parameters.description: End of the query window (UTC, exclusive).
parameters.name: endTime

get.summary: GetTokenThroughput returns the current per-second Token throughput.

GetValueAttributionModuleBoosts returns module boost percentages from config.
No time_range parameter; returns static configuration data.

parameters.description:
Time range filter: "today", "this-week", "this-month", "this-quarter".
Defaults to "this-month" when omitted.
parameters.name: timeRange

parameters.description: Optional cluster filter; when empty, all clusters are aggregated.
parameters.name: query.cluster

parameters.description: Optional time range token: 24h, 7d or 1m. Defaults to 24h.
parameters.name: query.range

parameters.description:
Optional IANA timezone (e.g. "Asia/Shanghai") for rendering x-axis
labels. The data points themselves are stored in UTC, but the chart
should display them in the user's local time so timestamps line up
with what they see on the wall clock. Falls back to the tariff
timezone, then UTC, when empty.
parameters.name: query.timezone

parameters.description: Optional cluster filter; when empty, all clusters are aggregated.
parameters.name: query.cluster

get.summary: GetRuntimeMode returns the current deployment runtime mode (csp or ws).
GetCostAttribution returns cost attribution breakdown.

parameters.description: Optional cluster name filter. Empty means all clusters.
parameters.name: cluster

parameters.description:
Time range for token/revenue queries. Default is THIS_MONTH.

 - THIS_MONTH: Current calendar month (default)
 - THIS_WEEK: Current calendar week (Monday to now)
 - LAST_MONTH: Previous calendar month
 - LAST_7_DAYS: Rolling last 7 days
 - LAST_30_DAYS: Rolling last 30 days
parameters.name: timeRange

get.summary: ListCostClusters returns all cluster names that have GPU nodes.
GetGpuEfficiency returns GPU model efficiency ranking.

parameters.description: Optional cluster name filter. Empty means all clusters.
parameters.name: cluster

parameters.description:

 - THIS_MONTH: Current calendar month (default)
 - THIS_WEEK: Current calendar week (Monday to now)
 - LAST_MONTH: Previous calendar month
 - LAST_7_DAYS: Rolling last 7 days
 - LAST_30_DAYS: Rolling last 30 days

businessoperationBusinessPanelMeta.description: BusinessPanelMeta contains summary and warning information shared by panel responses.

businessoperationBusinessRankItem.description: BusinessRankItem is a generic ranking item used by ranking panels.

businessoperationBusinessRiskObject.description: BusinessRiskObject describes a tenant risk object entry.

businessoperationBusinessSuggestion.description: BusinessSuggestion is a suggestion row displayed on the business dashboard.

businessoperationDashboardGrowthData.description: DashboardGrowthData is the tenant growth panel payload.

businessoperationDashboardGrowthSeries.description: DashboardGrowthSeries is one line in the tenant growth panel.

businessoperationDashboardKpiCard.description: DashboardKpiCard is the display-ready KPI contract used by the business dashboard.

businessoperationDashboardMessageParam.description: BusinessPanelMeta contains summary and warning information shared by panel responses.

businessoperationDashboardQuadrantPoint.description: DashboardQuadrantPoint represents one bubble point in the tenant value quadrant.

businessoperationDashboardSankeyColumn.description: DashboardSankeyColumn groups nodes into one sankey column.

businessoperationDashboardSankeyFlow.description: DashboardSankeyFlow is the full sankey panel payload.

businessoperationDashboardSankeyLink.description: DashboardSankeyLink is an edge in the sankey panel.

businessoperationDashboardSankeyNode.description: DashboardSankeyNode is a node in the sankey panel.

businessoperationDashboardSubItem.description: DashboardSubItem is a small label-value pair displayed below a KPI card.

businessoperationDepartmentTokenConsumpt.description: DepartmentTokenConsumptionRankItem is a department token consumption rank item.

businessoperationGrowthPanelResponse.description: GrowthPanelResponse returns the tenant growth trend panel.

businessoperationKpiPanelResponse.description: KpiPanelResponse returns a single KPI card panel.

businessoperationListActiveDepartmentsRe.description: ListActiveDepartmentsResponse contains the active department count.

businessoperationListActiveTenantsRespon.description: ListActiveTenantsResponse is the response message for ListActiveTenants.

endTime.description: End time of the statistics period.

kpi.description: Display-ready KPI card for the current panel.

meta.description: Panel meta for summary and warnings.

startTime.description: Start time of the statistics period.

statisticsTime.description: Server timestamp when the statistics were generated.

businessoperationListBusinessModelsRespo.description: ListBusinessModelsResponse returns model options for the business dashboard filter.

businessoperationMonthlyARPUResponse.description: MonthlyARPUResponse is the response message for GetMonthlyARPU.

businessoperationMonthlyRevenueResponse.description: MonthlyRevenueResponse is the response message for GetMonthlyRevenue.

businessoperationMonthlyTokenConsumption.description: MonthlyTokenConsumptionResponse is the response message for GetMonthlyTokenConsumption.

businessoperationQuadrantPanelResponse.description: QuadrantPanelResponse returns the tenant value quadrant panel.

businessoperationRankingPanelResponse.description: RankingPanelResponse returns a generic ranking panel.

businessoperationRiskObjectsPanelRespons.description: RiskObjectsPanelResponse returns the tenant risk object panel.

businessoperationSankeyPanelResponse.description: SankeyPanelResponse returns a sankey flow panel.

businessoperationTenantTokenConsumptionR.description: TenantTokenConsumptionRankItem is a tenant token consumption rank item.

businessvalueAppConsumptionItem.description: AppConsumptionItem represents consumption ratio for a single application.

appName.description: Application name (e.g., "API 接入", "Web 工作台 001").

businessvalueCumulativeOutputHistoryPoin.description: CumulativeOutputHistoryPoint represents a single point in the cumulative output history.

businessvalueDepartmentTokenUsageItem.description: DepartmentTokenUsageItem represents a single department's usage and budget in the time window.

budgetTokenTotal.description: Budget token total for the requested time window.

tokenTotal.description: Total token usage (input_tokens + output_tokens) in the time window.

businessvalueGetApiKeyCountResponse.description: GetApiKeyCountResponse is the response for GetApiKeyCount.

apiKeyCount.description: Count of distinct API keys used in the time window.

businessvalueGetAppConsumptionDistributi.description: GetAppConsumptionDistributionResponse is the response message for GetAppConsumptionDistribution.

items.description: List of application consumption items sorted by percentage descending, capped at 10.

businessvalueGetCapacityBottleneckForeca.description: GetCapacityBottleneckForecastResponse is the response message for GetCapacityBottleneckForecast.

currentDailyThroughputMillion.description: Current full-day token throughput in millions.

dailyGrowthRateMillion.description: Daily growth rate (linear regression slope) in millions of tokens per day.

daysToCapacity.description:
Predicted days until throughput reaches rated capacity.
0 = already at/over capacity; -1 = infinite (growth is zero/negative or insufficient data).

businessvalueGetCumulativeOutputResponse.description: GetCumulativeOutputResponse is the response message for GetCumulativeOutput.

growthDeltaValue.description: Net delta value (current - previous tokens). Used when growth_is_percent is false.

growthIsPercent.description: True when growth_rate_percent is valid; false when previous <= 0 (use growth_delta_value instead).

growthRatePercent.description: Growth rate compared with previous same-period same-progress (percentage).

historyPoints.description: History points for non-today ranges; empty for today (frontend samples locally).

totalTokens.description: Current cumulative total tokens (input + output + cached) in selected range.

businessvalueGetDepartmentTokenUsageResp.description: GetDepartmentTokenUsageResponse is the response for GetDepartmentTokenUsage.

items.description: All departments with token usage in the window, sorted by token_total descending.

businessvalueGetInternalBusinessStructur.description: GetInternalBusinessStructureDistributionResponse is the response message for GetInternalBusinessStructureDistribution.

items.description: List of internal business structure items sorted by value descending.

businessvalueGetMonthEndForecastMetricsR.description: GetMonthEndForecastMetricsResponse is the response message for GetMonthEndForecastMetrics.

monthEndGrossMarginVsLastMonthPp.description: Gross margin vs last month in percentage points.

monthEndRevenueVsLastMonthDeltaAmount.description: Revenue forecast vs last month net delta (used when last month revenue <= 0).

monthEndRevenueVsLastMonthPercent.description: Revenue forecast vs last month percent (valid only when last month revenue > 0).

revenueComparisonIsPercent.description: Indicates whether the revenue comparison uses percent (true) or net delta (false).

businessvalueGetRatedCapacityResponse.description: GetRatedCapacityResponse is the response message for GetRatedCapacity.

ratedCapacityMillion.description: Rated capacity value in millions (e.g., 2.10 means 2.10M tok/s).

businessvalueGetRevenueAndProfitMetricsR.description: GetRevenueAndProfitMetricsResponse is the response message for GetRevenueAndProfitMetrics.

history.description: History points for non-today ranges; empty for today (frontend samples locally).

revenueYoyDeltaAmount.description: Revenue net delta amount (current - previous). Used when revenue_yoy_is_percent is false.

revenueYoyIsPercent.description: True when revenue_yoy_rate_percent is valid; false when previous revenue <= 0 (use revenue_yoy_delta_amount instead).

businessvalueGetRevenueMarginTrendForeca.description: GetRevenueMarginTrendForecastResponse is the response message for GetRevenueMarginTrendForecast.

forecastStartDate.description:
The date at which forecast data begins (first forecast point's date).
Frontend uses this to split solid (history) vs dashed (forecast) lines.

points.description:
Exactly 37 daily points ordered by date ascending.
Points [0..29] are historical, points [30..36] are forecast.

businessvalueGetRiskSuggestionsResponse.description: GetRiskSuggestionsResponse is the response message for GetRiskSuggestions.

businessvalueGetTenantTokenUsageResponse.description: GetTenantTokenUsageResponse is the response for GetTenantTokenUsage.

items.description: All tenants with token usage in the window, sorted by token_total descending.

businessvalueGetTokenThroughputResponse.description: GetTokenThroughputResponse is the response message for GetTokenThroughput.

businessvalueGetValueAttributionModuleBo.description: GetValueAttributionModuleBoostsResponse is the response message for GetValueAttributionModuleBoosts.

moduleItems.description: Per-module attribution results, ordered by cost_savings descending.

totalCostSavings.description: Total cost savings for the requested time range (元).

totalSavingsRate.description: Total savings rate as a 0–100 percentage (sum of all module improvement rates × 100).

businessvalueInternalBusinessStructureIt.description: InternalBusinessStructureItem represents a single internal business structure item.

value.description: Integer metric value used for rank-bar rendering.

businessvalueRevenueAndProfitHistoryPoin.description: RevenueAndProfitHistoryPoint represents a single point in the revenue/profit history.

businessvalueRevenueMarginTrendPoint.description: RevenueMarginTrendPoint represents a single daily data point in the trend series.

cost.description: Cost amount for this day (infrastructure + upstream token cost).

date.description: Date of this data point (truncated to day, UTC).

grossProfit.description: Gross profit for this day (revenue - cost).

revenue.description: Revenue amount for this day (in yuan, already divided by 1M from raw).

businessvalueRiskSuggestion.description: RiskSuggestion represents a single risk identification or business suggestion.

type.description: Type of the suggestion (warning, info, success).

businessvalueSuggestionType.description: SuggestionType defines the type of a risk suggestion.

businessvalueTenantTokenUsageItem.description: TenantTokenUsageItem represents a single tenant's usage and charge in the time window.

price.description: Charge amount in yuan calculated via the SKU charger.

tokenTotal.description: Total token usage (input_tokens + output_tokens) in the time window.

businessvalueValueAttributionModuleItem.description: ValueAttributionModuleItem holds the backend-computed attribution result for a single module.

costSavings.description: Cost savings attributed to this module for the requested time range (元).

sharePercent.description: This module's share of total cost savings as a 0–100 percentage.

clusterPhase.description:
cluster_phase mirrors the raw kpanda `ClusterStatus.phase`
string (e.g. "Running", "Failed", "Creating", "Updating",
"Deleting", "DeleteFailed", "Unknown") so the frontend can
surface the exact value in tooltip text. Empty when kpanda did
not report a phase.

gpuCount.description:
Number of GPU devices in the cluster; surfaced on the region
card so the operator can tell at a glance whether a saturated
region is a small dev cluster or a full GPU pod.

isOffline.description:
is_offline reflects the kpanda authoritative offline judgement:
true when `ClusterStatus.phase` is anything other than "Running"
(or its absence). The frontend uses it to render the historical-
state hint on the region card. False when phase is "Running" or
kpanda did not return a phase for this cluster.

computepowercollaborationPanelQuery.description:
Query parameters shared across panels that support cluster / time-range
filtering. Pure-mock panels may ignore these fields but must not error.

cluster.description: Optional cluster filter; when empty, all clusters are aggregated.

range.description: Optional time range token: 24h, 7d or 1m. Defaults to 24h.

timezone.description:
Optional IANA timezone (e.g. "Asia/Shanghai") for rendering x-axis
labels. The data points themselves are stored in UTC, but the chart
should display them in the user's local time so timestamps line up
with what they see on the wall clock. Falls back to the tariff
timezone, then UTC, when empty.

id.description: 错误 ID，用于判断错误类型

message.description: 错误消息，会自动切换中英文

platformconfigGetRuntimeModeResponse.description: GetRuntimeModeResponse is the response for GetRuntimeMode.

mode.description: mode is the current runtime mode: "csp" (public cloud) or "ws" (private deployment).

key.description:
For ready placeholder groups, message can carry a TODO(data-source) note
that documents which real source should replace the current fake panel.

hotGpuPools.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake ranking with GPU pool utilization,
temperature, and power telemetry.

hotModels.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake ranking with realtime model traffic and
serving usage ranking.

latencyTrend.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake latency trend with TTFT/TPOT P50/P99
percentile timelines.

queueKpis.title:
TODO(data-source): populate these cards from queue_depth, KV cache hit
rate, GPU average utilization, and degradation/throttling sources. This
array currently carries the 队列深度、KV Cache 命中率、GPU 平均利用率、降级/限流状态 四张 panel。

realtimeKpis.title:
TODO(data-source): populate these cards from request_rate, token_throughput,
TTFT P50/P99, and TPOT P50/P99 sources. This array currently carries the
realtime request量、Token 吞吐、TTFT、TPOT 四张 panel。

suggestions.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake suggestions with production insight and
governance recommendation rules.

throughputTrend.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake throughput trend with request and token
throughput minute-level timelines.

timeline.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake timeline with alert, release, scaling,
and scheduling event streams.

gpuPoolRank.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake GPU pool rank with card count,
utilization, per-card output value, and power telemetry.

mismatchReport.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake mismatch report with model-GPU mismatch
analysis and migration action recommendations.

modelRank.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake model rank with model daily output,
unit cost, latency percentile, and SLA status.

suggestions.description:
TODO(data-source): replace the fake suggestions with placement optimization
insights and cost governance recommendations.

synergyKpis.description:
TODO(data-source): populate these cards from deployed model inventory, GPU
pool inventory, best match rate, mismatch loss, and weighted SLA sources.

unitCostCompare.description:
Unit Token cost comparison is intentionally separated from model_rank so
the panel can render cost rows even when the model ranking falls back or
has no runtime rows.

resourceconstCostAttributionItem.description: CostAttributionItem is one item in the cost attribution breakdown.

resourceconstCostAttributionResponse.description: CostAttributionResponse contains the cost attribution breakdown.

resourceconstCostKpisResponse.description: CostKpisResponse contains GPU KPI summary metrics.

resourceconstCostWaterfallItem.description: CostWaterfallItem holds one step in the cost optimization waterfall.

resourceconstCostWaterfallResponse.description: CostWaterfallResponse contains the waterfall chart data.

resourceconstGpuEfficiencyResponse.description: GpuEfficiencyResponse contains the GPU efficiency ranking rows.

resourceconstGpuEfficiencyRow.description: GpuEfficiencyRow is one row in the GPU efficiency ranking.

resourceconstListCostClustersResponse.description: ListCostClustersResponse contains the list of cluster names.

resourceconstModelCostRankItem.description: ModelCostRankItem is one entry in the model cost ranking.

resourceconstModelCostRankResponse.description: ModelCostRankResponse contains the model cost ranking items.

resourceconstTimeRange.description:
TimeRange specifies the time window for data queries.

 - THIS_MONTH: Current calendar month (default)
 - THIS_WEEK: Current calendar week (Monday to now)
 - LAST_MONTH: Previous calendar month
 - LAST_7_DAYS: Rolling last 7 days
 - LAST_30_DAYS: Rolling last 30 days

id.description: 错误 ID，用于判断错误类型

message.description: 错误消息，会自动切换中英文
